overall.description: A cinematic third-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city (Cyberpunk 2077), starting under an elevated highway and progressing through busy streets with futuristic vehicles, digital billboards, and palm trees, ending along a waterfront canal. The scene features bright morning sunlight with strong lens flares and a mix of modern glass towers and industrial structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian walkway under elevated highway with planters

events.description: emerges from under the overpass into more open sidewalk area with increased sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk, passing planters and approaching a security gate

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in pink top walking toward camera on the right side

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure casting shadows over the walkway
tall palm tree trunk with fronds visible against the sky
tall futuristic skyscraper with DTR logo near the top, bathed in morning light
large structural support column for the overpass
raised concrete planters with tall grasses and small trees
black metal gate structure blocking access to the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive elevated highway overpass with concrete pillars and palm trees lining the walkway. The camera moves forward past planters with vegetation toward a metal security fence, with the DTR tower visible in the distance. Sparse pedestrians walk in the opposite direction as the scene transitions from sheltered to more open lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city intersection with moving traffic

events.description: futuristic black vehicle passes by on the street ahead
character steps onto the crosswalk and begins crossing the multi-lane street

agents.ego_description: waiting at the intersection then crossing the street while futuristic vehicles pass by

notable_agents.action: futuristic silver car driving past the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: sleek black futuristic car with glowing elements driving on the road
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt
yellow pole with traffic signals and attached digital signage
large suspended digital screen displaying advertisements above the street

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into a bright, open intersection with futuristic vehicles driving past. The camera crosses the striped crosswalk while silver and black futuristic cars navigate the road. Overhead digital billboards and the DTR tower dominate the skyline as the scene shifts from sheltered to fully exposed sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection crosswalk with industrial buildings ahead

events.description: group of pedestrians begins crossing the street from right to left
character reaches the opposite sidewalk and turns left toward the waterfront

agents.ego_description: finishing crossing the intersection and turning left along the sidewalk with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with distinctive red mohawk walking in the same direction ahead

entered.detail: curved elevated highway ramp structure on the right side
industrial structure with visible steam vents and green scaffolding
pedestrian crossing signal box with walk symbol illuminated
metal safety barrier along the edge of the canal

segments.scene_description: The character completes crossing the busy intersection alongside other pedestrians, including one with a red mohawk. The scene shows industrial buildings with steam vents ahead and an overpass ramp curving to the right. The camera turns left toward a waterfront area, with the crosswalk signal and safety railings coming into view as traffic continues to flow behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with industrial dock structures

events.description: view opens up to reveal the canal water and industrial dock structures on the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront path following the pedestrian with red hair, observing the canal and industrial structures

entered.detail: murky green water channel running parallel to the walkway with industrial edges
metal industrial platform with pipes and machinery extending over the water
bright yellow posts along the water edge for docking boats
large digital billboard displaying a stylized skull graphic

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the waterfront promenade with the canal visible on the right and industrial dock structures extending over the water. Yellow mooring bollards line the path while palm trees provide sparse shade. The elevated highway recedes into the distance as the camera continues along the concrete walkway, passing digital billboards and industrial buildings with glass facades.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sheltered shadows of an urban overpass into a bright, sun-drenched futuristic cityscape and along a waterfront promenade. It begins under a massive elevated highway, moving past concrete pillars and palm trees toward a metal security fence with the DTR tower looming in the distance. As the camera emerges from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a brilliant intersection where silver and black futuristic vehicles navigate striped crosswalks beneath towering digital billboards. The movement then carries the viewer across the busy road past diverse pedestrians and steaming industrial vents before turning left away from the traffic. Finally, the camera glides along a concrete waterfront promenade, passing yellow mooring bollards and glass-facade buildings as the canal opens up on the right and the highway recedes into the distance.
